column1: # Source: Bertelsmann Stiftung, BTI Transformation Index
# License: free; cite Bertelsmann Stiftung. Reprinted with permission per BTI terms of use.
# This file is the single source of truth for which BTI indicators are
# read in Stage 2. Every Stage 2 BTI adapter call resolves its
# raw_column from this file. Adding/removing an indicator here is the
# only change needed to widen or narrow the BTI ingestion for the
# BTI is a biennial expert-coded assessment. Each edition covers the
# ~2-year period preceding its publication year (verified in the
# metadata.json for BTI 2024 -> covers 2022-2023; same pattern holds
# for the other editions). The Stage 2 adapter maps BTI editions to
# the in-coverage year that matches the requested target year:
# For the prototype target year 2023, the adapter reads the
# if a future BTI release changes the coverage interval, only the
# helper sheet_for_year() in bti_io.py needs updating.
# Each BTI sheet has the same 123-column layout:
# Stage 2 reads only the catalog's raw_column subset; the rest of the
# columns are skipped to keep the frame narrow.
# The catalog covers the 4 governance/effectiveness composites
# (required by the deliverable spec) plus 8 representative question
# fields from Q1-Q12 (1 composite per question, not the Qx.1-Qx.4
# The Q13 "Level of Difficulty" composite is intentionally excluded
# from the catalog even though it lives on the same sheets: higher
# Q13 means more difficulty (a constraint, not a quality signal), so
# its direction is inverted relative to the other composites. Keeping
# it out of the catalog for now avoids a per-source direction flag
# (the Stage 5 score module can ingest it directly from the parquet
# if/when a difficulty-adjusted rubric is built).
# The BTI xlsx does not use an explicit missing token; missing cells
# are blank (None). The Stage 2 reader filters rows by the country
# column (col 0) and treats missing cells as NaN. The raw_value audit
# trail preserves the original cell text for non-missing cells (the
# integer or float the source published).
# The header row has a merged cell in col 0 carrying the multi-line

column2: ..." label. The Stage 2 reader skips this cell and

column1: # strings so the read function can match them by direct equality.
# The BTI xlsx carries country names only (no ISO3 column). The
# Stage 2 reader writes the BTI display name to source_row_reference
# Stage 3 (country match) resolves the BTI display name to the
# canonical ISO3 via the country alias table (same pattern as
# SIPRI milex and V-Dem's pre-v13 country_text_id).

column2: Governance Index,effectiveness,1-10,0-10,1,bti_score,Governance Index (G) — composite measure of governance performance: steering capability + resource efficiency + consensus-building + international cooperation. BTI 1-10 scale (10 = best).

Governance Performance,effectiveness,1-10,0-10,1,bti_score,Governance Performance (GII) — composite measure of governance quality: Q14-Q17 mean minus Q13 Level of Difficulty (difficulty-adjusted governance score). BTI 1-10 scale (10 = best).

Status Index,political_freedom,1-10,0-10,1,bti_score,Status Index (S) — composite political transformation score: mean of Q1-Q5 (stateness, political participation, rule of law, stability of democratic institutions, political and social integration). BTI 1-10 scale (10 = best democracy status).
Democracy Status,political_freedom,1-10,0-10,1,bti_score,Democracy Status (SI) — composite democracy measure derived from S + Q7-Q12 economic indicators. BTI 1-10 scale (10 = best).
Stateness,political_freedom,1-10,0-10,1,bti_score,Q1 Stateness — monopoly on the use of force, state identity, no interference of religious dogmas, basic administration. BTI 1-10 scale (10 = best).

Political Participation,political_freedom,1-10,0-10,1,bti_score,Q2 Political Participation — free and fair elections, effective power to govern, association/assembly rights, freedom of expression. BTI 1-10 scale (10 = best).
Rule of Law,political_freedom,1-10,0-10,1,bti_score,Q3 Rule of Law — separation of powers, independent judiciary, prosecution of office abuse, civil rights. BTI 1-10 scale (10 = best).

Stability of Democratic Institutions,political_freedom,1-10,0-10,1,bti_score,Q4 Stability of Democratic Institutions — performance of + commitment to democratic institutions. BTI 1-10 scale (10 = best).

Political and Social Integration,political_freedom,1-10,0-10,1,bti_score,Q5 Political and Social Integration — party system, interest groups, approval of democracy, social capital. BTI 1-10 scale (10 = best).

Level of Socioeconomic Development,economic_wellbeing,1-10,0-10,1,bti_score,Q6 Level of Socioeconomic Development — socioeconomic barriers (poverty, inequality, education, health). BTI 1-10 scale (10 = best).

Organization of the Market and Competition,economic_wellbeing,1-10,0-10,1,bti_score,Q7 Organization of the Market and Competition — market organization, competition policy, foreign trade liberalization, banking system. BTI 1-10 scale (10 = best).
Economic Performance,economic_wellbeing,1-10,0-10,1,bti_score,Q11 Economic Performance — output strength (GDP growth, inflation, unemployment). BTI 1-10 scale (10 = best).
